legacy.full_text:
We shill the NFT projects we love on people's tweets cause we see value. No value,no shill.
Don't just take. Leave something in return. A follow is a sign of respect.Even a trade for one's time to read your shill.
Learn common sense from your leaders. 🤜🤛
Retweet for awareness❤️ https://t.co/wy400jbl2B
